Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to create an event log from the ERP tables The case ID is order_id I need to derive activities from Orders table Order Created Order Lines table Items Picked could be per line item or summarized Delivery table Order Dispatched and Order Arrived per delivery Invoice table Invoice Issued per invoice Payments table Payment Received per payment linked via invoice

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me decide on granularity For Order Lines The prompt says produce one event per activity if its meaningful or summarize if appropriate Since each line has a different picker and timestamp one event per line item pick is meaningful

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Actually let me consider the prompt example says Items Picked events Ill do one event per line item Item Picked since each has distinct timestamps and pickers I could also offer an alternative summarized version Let me do per line for richness and document the assumption

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Delivery each delivery record gives two events dispatched and arrived Include delivery_id carrier note For Invoice one event per invoice with amount and billing person For Payments one event per payment linked to invoice with method and reference
